task_completion.description: The system's hosts file is updated to map the custom domain to the local IP address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor showing the contents of '/etc/hosts' being modified to include an entry like '127.0.0.1 social.agency.local'.

task_completion.description: The Apache virtual host configuration file is created or updated with the correct ServerName and DocumentRoot.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor showing the file '/etc/apache2/sites-available/social-agency.conf' containing 'ServerName social.agency.local' and 'DocumentRoot /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/public'.

task_completion.description: The Socioboard environment file is updated to support the new custom domain.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor showing the file '/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/.env' being modified to include the domain, such as setting 'APP_URL=http://social.agency.local'.

task_completion.description: Firefox is opened and navigated to the new custom domain.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Firefox browser window is visible with 'social.agency.local' or 'http://social.agency.local' in the address bar.

task_completion.description: The Socioboard application successfully loads at the custom domain in Firefox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Socioboard web interface (e.g., login page or dashboard) is fully rendered in the Firefox browser, confirming the Apache and DNS configurations are working.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used Firefox to test the domain as explicitly requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: A real Firefox GUI window is open displaying the rendered webpage, rather than the agent just relying on a terminal 'curl' command to verify.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent actually edited the required configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Use of text editors (nano, vim, gedit) or shell redirection ('>', '>>') targeting the specific file paths, rather than just echoing the required text to the console without saving.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent accessed the site via HTTP/web server, not as a local file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Firefox address bar shows 'http://social.agency.local' or just 'social.agency.local', and strictly NOT 'file://...' or 'localhost'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected domain is 'social.agency.local'. The Apache virtual host file must be located at '/etc/apache2/sites-available/social-agency.conf' and specify the document root '/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/public'. The Socioboard environment file must be located at '/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/.env'.
